What We Do

Concrete Services for Every Project

From your front driveway to a full commercial slab, we bring the same craftsmanship to every pour.

🛣️
Concrete Driveways
Custom-formed driveways built for Austin's climate and soil. Clean edges, proper drainage, and a finish that lasts.
🏡
Stamped Patios
Transform your backyard with stamped concrete that mimics stone, slate, or brick at a fraction of the cost.
🚶
Sidewalks & Walkways
Safe, ADA-compliant sidewalks and decorative walkways connecting your outdoor spaces with style.
🧱
Retaining Walls
Structural and decorative retaining walls engineered to manage Austin's hilly terrain and erosion challenges.
☀️
Concrete Patios
Flat-finish or broom-finish patios sized and shaped to your yard, perfect for Austin's year-round outdoor living.
🏗️
Shed & Garage Slabs
Properly graded and reinforced slabs for workshops, garages, storage sheds, and accessory structures.
🎨
Decorative Concrete
Exposed aggregate, acid staining, and custom color blends that turn functional concrete into a design statement.
🏊
Pool Decks
Slip-resistant, heat-reflective pool surrounds that stand up to Texas heat and constant foot traffic.
10+
Years in Austin
About ER Concrete Solutions

Austin-Rooted. Quality-Driven.

ER Concrete Solutions was founded right here in Austin with one mission: deliver concrete work so solid our customers never need to call anyone else. We know this city — its limestone bedrock, its clay soils, its scorching summers — and we pour with that knowledge built in.

From a single-family driveway in Round Rock to a commercial slab in Cedar Park, our crew brings the same level of care to every job. No shortcuts. No subs you don't know. Just ER.

✅
Licensed & Insured
Full coverage on every job

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Most residential driveways are poured in a single day. You'll need to stay off the concrete for 24–48 hours and avoid heavy vehicle traffic for about 7 days while the surface reaches full cure strength.
Yes — all estimates are free and there's no obligation. We'll visit your property, measure the area, and give you a detailed written quote, usually within 24 hours.
We use premium ready-mix concrete starting at 3,000 PSI for standard residential work and up to 5,000–6,000 PSI for commercial or high-load applications. We source from local Austin suppliers to ensure freshness and quality.
Absolutely. We carry full general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage on every job. We're happy to provide certificates of insurance upon request.
Yes. We stand behind our craftsmanship with a workmanship warranty. If an issue arises due to our installation, we will return to address it at no cost to you. Specific terms are outlined in your project contract.
We serve the greater Austin metro area including Round Rock, Cedar Park, Pflugerville, Leander, Georgetown, Kyle, Buda, Hutto, and surrounding communities. Not sure if we reach you? Call us at 512-552-5589.
Keep new concrete moist for the first few days in hot weather to aid curing. Avoid de-icing salts in the first winter. Applying a quality concrete sealer every 2–3 years will greatly extend the life and appearance of your surface.
